seoTitle: How to Cancel Your Coursera Plus Subscription Fast
metaDescription: Cancel Coursera Plus from your account settings in a few steps so you stop paying for a subscription you no longer need, without losing course access early.
intro: If you've finished what you needed on Coursera Plus, or just want to stop the recurring charge before it renews, canceling only takes a couple of minutes once you know where the setting lives. This walks through finding the subscription controls, confirming the cancellation, and what to check afterward so you're not billed again.

steps.heading: Open your Coursera Plus account settings
steps.body: Sign in and head to the account or subscription section where your Coursera Plus plan is listed.

steps.heading: Find the cancellation option
steps.body: Locate the subscription management area and select the option to cancel or end your Coursera Plus membership.

steps.heading: Confirm the cancellation
steps.body: Coursera will typically ask you to confirm the change before it takes effect, so review the details before finalizing.

steps.heading: Check your renewal date and confirmation
steps.body: After canceling, confirm you've received an acknowledgment and note when your access ends so you can plan around it.

faq.question: Will I lose access to my courses right away if I cancel?
faq.answer: Canceling stops future billing, but you typically keep access through the remainder of your current billing period rather than losing it instantly.

faq.question: How do I know the cancellation actually went through?
faq.answer: Look for a confirmation message or email after you complete the cancellation, and double-check your subscription status in account settings.

faq.question: Can businesses managing employee accounts cancel the same way?
faq.answer: Yes, the same account settings apply whether you're managing your own subscription or one tied to short-term employee training.

faq.question: What if I want to come back to Coursera Plus later?
faq.answer: You can generally resubscribe at any time through the same account settings if you decide to return.
